title: Peak Physical Form Modpack
description: A modpack that has been carefully selected to be cohesive and coherent. This is the peak form of Minecraft with mods.
body:
**_for this modpack to run well please allocate at least 4gb of RAM or as much as you can without exceeding half of your system RAM_**

This modpack has been carefully designed to be **cohesive** and **coherent.** The principle rule for this modpack is that: There is only one mod for every major aspect of the game (Create is the ONLY technological mod).

The other main goal with this modpack is to avoid overlap as much as possible; with the aim of achieving a gameplay experience that is **consistent** and **believeable.**

## Main Features:

### **World Generation/Features:**

1. Lithosphere (Terrain)
2. Fabric Seasons (Weather and Crop Seasons)
3. Wilder Wild (Biomes)
4. Immersive Weathering (Block Interactions)
5. Dungeons and Taverns (Structures)
6. Incendium (The Nether)
7. Nullscape (The End)

### **Technology:**

1. Create Mod

### **Farming & Food:**

1. Farmer's Delight (Crops)
2. Diet (Food Groups + Perks)
3. Spice of Fabric (Food Penalties)

### **Gameplay Features:**

1. RPG Series (Archers, Wizards, Warriors, etc.)
2. Better Combat
3. Small Ships
4. Better Days (Longer Days and Night Simulation)
5. Spelunkery (Caves)

### **Mobs:**

1. Naturalist
2. Wilder Wild
   
### **Shaders:**

- Complementary (Default)
- Shrimple (Mid Range Performance)
- MakeUp - Ultra Fast (Best Performance)

Additional Features Include:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **Optimizations**

1. Sodium
2. Iris
3. Indium
4. FerriteCore
5. Lithium
6. Entity Culling
7. Memory Leak Fix
8. ModernFix
9. More Culling
10. Noisium
11. ImmediatelyFast
12. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)

### **Cosmetics**

1. 3D Skin Layers
2. Advancement Plaques
3. Better F3
4. Blur+
5. Chat Animation
6. Eating Animation
7. Immersive Thunder
8. Legendary Tooltips
9. Make Bubbles Pop
10. Not Enough Animations
11. Model Gap Fix
12. Sounds
13. Status Effect Bars
14. Wakes
15. Visuality
16. Visual Workbench
17. Enhanced Boss Bars

### **Minor Gameplay Features**
  
1. Another Furniture
2. AppleSkin
3. Better Mount HUD
4. Blossom
5. Chalk
6. Chicken Nerf
7. ChickensShed
8. Companion
9. Crawl
10. Do a Barrel Roll
11. Dynamic Crosshair
12. HT's TreeChop
13. Fishing Real
14. Nyf's Spiders
15. NiftyCarts
</details>
